label: Innate T type3
evidence: Cell type label 'Innate T type3' is present in the fetal skin atlas annotations (Gopee et al., 2024) and corresponds to the 'type 3 innate T cell' annotation used by Suo et al. (2022) in the developing human immune system atlas. These are PLZF-expressing unconventional T cells with type 3 (IL-17-associated) effector potential, arising via thymocyte-thymocyte selection.
